notes.baseline_variance: The TODO marker count (8 vs 43 expected) differs significantly because the baseline likely counted all occurrences of 'TODO' including model field names and comment labels. Actual actionable TODO items are 8.
notes.dead_code_variance: The dead code estimate (5000 lines expected vs ~145 found) differs because 0700a already cleaned up the majority of dead code related to light mode. The remaining items are isolated comments and always-true conditions.
notes.skipped_tests_note: Many skipped tests (188 found vs 168 expected) fall into categories: removed functionality (delete tests), infrastructure issues (fix test framework), or conditional skips (keep). Prioritize fixing the 3 critical production bug-related skips.
notes.0700a_impact: Light mode removal was thorough - no residual dead branches found. The isDarkTheme getter now returns constant true, but no code was found that conditionally executes based on its false branch.
